Watch AnitaCelt break the cycle in our original music video! Made with Grok Imagine, the entire visual landscape and all armor sets are heavily inspired by the breathtaking world design and outfits of Aion 2. Join the escape from Asmodian shadows to the Tower of Light. It is time to ascend.

embed.alt:
Welcome to the official music video for our original song, following AnitaCelt’s daring escape from the shadows of the Asmodian night. Every frame of this visual experience was generated using Grok Imagine, with the outfits, armor sets, and sprawling environments heavily inspired by the highly anticipated world design of Aion 2.

The visual journey captures the essence of a shattered Atreia. From the intricate, dark-plated armor and striking draconic wings to the luminescent, ethereal glow of the Daevas at the Tower of Light, we wanted to honor the incredible aesthetic of the Aion universe. You will notice the meticulous attention to detail in the character's progression—starting in the grim, moss-covered stone corridors of a dark tower, moving across the floating, gravity-defying islands of the Abyss, and finally standing before the chaotic elemental forces of the millennial war.

record.text: Step into the digital frontier with "Metrics," a heavy symphonic metal anthem. Watch as we crush the algorithm and break from the cage of reach. Created entirely with Grok Imagine, this cinematic journey features epic outfits and armor inspired heavily by the worlds of Aion 2

embed.alt:
Welcome back to the frontier of reality. "Metrics" continues our heavy, symphonic metal journey, plunging deeper into a digital dystopia where hollow shadows and synthetic bots drain the essence of humanity. The screen life has become a cage made of reach, and we are breaking out. When society trades its skin for a digital plot and builds castles out of fake acclaim, someone has to cross the line.

The Creative Vision & Wardrobe Design
This entire cinematic experience was conceptualized and generated utilizing the raw power of Grok Imagine, pushing the absolute limits of AI-driven 3D CGI storytelling. From the neon-lit server pillars to the acidic glowing underworlds, every frame was crafted to match the relentless, driving energy of the music.

record.text: We spend our hours chasing hollow shadows and synthetic friends. "Metrics" challenges the screen life we've built. Watch this entirely AI-generated symphonic metal music video and ask yourself: Are you living, or just checking your numbers?

embed.alt: This entire cinematic experience was conceptualized and generated using Grok Imagine, pushing the boundaries of AI-driven 3D CGI-style storytelling. Every environment—from the ethereal crystal gateways to the fiery gothic thrones and cyberpunk server rooms—was meticulously prompted to build a cohesive narrative. The audio production brings a massive symphonic metal soundscape, complete with driving guitar riffs, orchestral swells, and soaring vocals. By combining tools like DaVinci Resolve Studio and CapCut, the pacing and visual effects were fine-tuned to perfectly match the relentless energy of the track, resulting in a seamless, high-fidelity music video experience.

record.text:
Meta's old platform problem was mobile distribution.

Apple and Google controlled the gate.

Its new fear is similar: someone else controls the AI layer.

A better way to read tech news:

What changed?
Who controls the interface?
What data becomes available?
What business model benefits?
What dependency is being avoided?

If you want to understand AI companies, follow the infrastructure.

Capex tells you what the press release hides. The demo may be software, but the advantage is often physical and operational.

images.alt:
Para os moradores, os estabelecimentos funcionam de maneira irregular, causam barulho, atrapalham o sono e desvalorizam os imóveis de alto padrão da área conhecida como City Lapa.

"Nós vamos tirar uma por uma, porque estamos do lado da lei. Ah, 'coitados dos idosos'... Tudo bem, eles podem ir para outro lugar", diz a professora de pilates Carla Banietti, 53, presidente da Assampalba (Associação de Amigos e Moradores pela Preservação do Alto da Lapa e Bela Aliança).

Nos últimos meses, esse conflito chegou às ruas e à delegacia da Lapa. Um dos casos ocorreu no Residencial Lar Aconchego, onde vivem oito pessoas de 69 a 101 anos de idade. As duas sócias, Fabiana de Oliveira, 45, e Daniela Azevedo, 45, fizeram um boletim de ocorrência contra seus vizinhos, o casal de empresários Cristiano Ferrari, 59, e a esposa Elaine Ferrari, 60. Segundo elas, o casal tem constrangido funcionários, familiares e os próprios idosos que moram ao lado de sua casa.

Vídeos publicados nas redes sociais mostram uma caixa de som colocada pela família em direção à casa de repouso tocando uma música da banda AC/DC em alto volume. Outro mostra Elaine falando em direção às funcionárias da entidade. "As pessoas não querem a nossa rua cheia de casa de repouso, entendeu? Isso faz nossos imóveis desvalorizarem", afirma. O casal diz ser vítima de denúncia caluniosa.

Banietti, presidente da associação de moradores, nega preconceito na abordagem dos membros da entidade, mas critica as casas de repouso.

"É legal você chegar na tua casa e se deparar com carro funerário, com uma ambulância, com carro de oxigênio? Isso é ambiente de clínica. Você quer acordar com essa 'gemeção'? Você quer acordar com uma pessoa chorando, falando que vai morrer? Eles são doentes em processos de Alzheimer. Deveriam estar em um hospital ou lugar em que seja permitido [pela lei]."

Fabiana de Oliveira, do Lar Aconchego, diz que os idosos são silenciosos e que pacientes de Alzheimer podem eventualmente falar em voz alta, mas que isso não é frequente em sua casa de repouso.

The dispute highlights growing tensions within Texas Republican politics over criminal justice decisions and high-profile endorsements ahead of the Senate race.

Mid-20th Century Christmas Morning Gifts in 1950s–1960s Photos

🤖 IA: It's clickbait ⚠️
👥 Users: It's clickbait ⚠️

#christmas #vintagephotos #midcentury

external.description: The article presents a nostalgic look at Christmas mornings during the mid-20th century, particularly the 1950s and 1960s, using a collection of vintage photographs that capture people with their holiday gifts. It highlights how the post-war economic boom and the rise of mass consumer culture shaped the experience of Christmas during this era. For children, Christmas morning was filled with excitement as they unwrapped iconic toys that defined the period. Boys commonly received items such as Matchbox cars, Erector Sets, and later early G.I. Joe action figures, while girls often received Barbie dolls, Chatty Cathy dolls, or miniature Easy-Bake Ovens. Simple yet engaging toys like Silly Putty, Play-Doh, and Etch A Sketch also reflected the importance of imagination in play during that time. The article also explores adult gift-giving traditions, which often emphasized practicality and emerging modern comforts. Women frequently received household appliances like toasters, blenders, or electric mixers, reflecting the domestic ideals of the era, while men were often gifted hobby-related items such as smoking pipes, mantel clocks, or coordinated family pajamas for holiday photos. Across all age groups, gifts symbolized prosperity, family unity, and optimism about modern life. The accompanying photographs serve as a visual archive of mid-century Christmas culture, showcasing both the simplicity and emotional warmth of holiday celebrations before the digital age. Overall, the piece paints a vivid picture of how consumer goods, family traditions, and cultural expectations shaped Christmas in the 1950s and 1960s.
external.title: Mid-20th Century Christmas Morning Gifts in 1950s–1960s Photos

Economic confidence decline raises concerns for Republicans ahead of the midterm elections

🤖 IA: It's clickbait ⚠️
👥 Users: It's clickbait ⚠️

#midterms #polls 

View full AI summary:

external.description:
A recent Gallup poll indicating a sharp drop in public confidence about the U.S. economy has sparked concern among Republican lawmakers and political analysts as the country approaches the midterm elections. According to the poll, only 16% of Americans rate current economic conditions as excellent or good, while 49% describe them as poor. In addition, 76% of respondents believe the economy is getting worse, marking the highest level of pessimism since 2023. Just 20% think conditions are improving.

The report, discussed by MS NOW commentators Ali Vitali and Jonathan Lemire, suggests that economic dissatisfaction could pose a significant political challenge for Republicans, who are widely expected to be judged on “kitchen table” issues such as inflation and household costs during the election cycle. Lemire emphasized that economic performance has historically played a decisive role in midterm outcomes.

Vitali added that while Republican leadership publicly maintains optimism, private conversations within the party reportedly reflect growing concern. She also pointed to rising gas prices, averaging around $4.52 per gallon compared to $3.19 a year earlier, as a key factor increasing voter frustration. She linked part of the economic strain to geopolitical tensions affecting energy costs.

The analysis further highlights a perception problem for Republicans, noting that voters are likely to hold the party accountable for economic conditions given their control of key branches of government. Internal political setbacks, including the collapse of a major reconciliation bill and ongoing legislative disagreements, are also seen as contributing to frustration among voters.

Finally, analysts suggest that shifts in voter coalitions—particularly among Hispanic voters who leaned Republican in 2024—could play a decisive role in the upcoming elections, with both parties closely watching whether recent gains prove durable.
external.title: Economic confidence decline raises concerns for Republicans ahead of the midterm elections

images.alt: 12. Secondly, building for the common good means accepting the limits and weakness of humanity without considering them an error to be corrected. Today, the human desire for fullness of life is at risk of being misled by deceitful goals, such as the prospect of a technology that promises to free us from all weakness, and models of wellbeing that leave behind entire populations. All too often, we place our hope in unlimited "upgrades," in forms of progress that exacerbate inequalities, and in immediate solutions incapable of healing people's wounds. As a result, while some pursue the illusion of unlimited self-assertion, many are deprived of basic necessities. The Church reminds us, with a firm yet humble voice, that true fulfilment is not achieved by eliminating weakness but through harmonious growth. It is found where freedom and responsibility are intertwined with mutual care and true solidarity, and where progress is measured by the dignity of each person and the good of all peoples.

record.bridgyOriginalText:
Perché ti danno l’AI gratis? La verità da 725 miliardi, l'economia dell'intenzione

https://peertube.uno/w/oZvEctNNJPSCirUTspsh8J

Perché Google, Microsoft e OpenAI stanno bruciando 725 miliardi di dollari in infrastrutture AI per darti tutto “gratis”?

La risposta non è solo la tua attenzione. È qualcosa di più profondo: la tua intenzione.

Anche questo video fa parte del canale "Una vita senza big tech" seguibile qui: @unavitasenzabigtech

Messaggio rilanciato nel gruppo @tecnologia

#AI #IA #bigtech

external.title: Original post on mastodon.uno

images.alt:
Screenshot pagina risposta di una IA.

Le aziende investono miliardi nell'infrastruttura Al (server, chip, data center) per due motivi principali:
accumulare dati e addestrare modelli proprietari per dominare il mercato e integrare I'lA nei propri ecosistemi per fidelizzare gli utenti.

Strategia di mercato e dati: Grandi player come Google e Amazon utilizzano versioni gratuite o a basso costo di IA all'interno dei loro servizi (es.
Android, Workspace) per catturare enormi quantita di dati di addestramento e impedire ai concorrenti di acquisire vantaggio competitivo.

Aumento del valore degli altri servizi: L'lA gratuita agisce come un "amplificatore" per i servizi a pagamento; ad esempio, I'lA di Amazon
(Rufus) o le partnership di ChatGPT con Walmart e Shopify aumentano significativamente le probabilita di acquisto e i ricavi complessivi, rendendo l'investimento iniziale un costo di acquisizione clienti.

Costi infrastrutturali reali: Nonostante I'accesso gratuito per I'utente finale, i costi per le aziende sono elevatissimi (pagamento per token, potenza
di calcolo), ma vengono giustificati dalla
necessita di mantenere la leadership tecnologica e dalla promessa di futuri ricavi derivanti dall'iper-personalizzazione dei prezzi e delle vendite.

Risposta generata dall'lA. Controlla i fatti importanti.

record.bridgyOriginalText:
@filippodb @unavitasenzabigtech @tecnologia

La domanda è interessante, la risposta mi convince poco. Perché penso che una AI, per quanto potente, non potrà mai prevalere sul principio di indeterminazione e stabilire le nostre intenzioni. Altrimenti il principio di indeterminazione non sarebbe più valido. Per condizionare l'individuo basta controllare i mezzi di comunicazione. Penso che la risposta sia molto più banale, come riportato in figura.

📜 Beschreibung 》
Im 4. Jahrhundert vor Christus reist der gebildete junge Eumenes gemeinsam mit dem großen Philosophen Aristoteles nach Kardia, seiner Heimat und dem Ort, an dem alles begann. Schon als Kind fiel Eumenes durch außergewöhnliche Begabung, scharfe Beobachtungsgabe und ein erstaunliches Urteilsvermögen auf. Doch ein Vorfall in Kardia reißt ihn aus seinem vertrauten Leben und zwingt ihn, sich seinem eigenen Schicksal zu stellen. Zwischen Seefahrten, rastlosen Tagen und neuen Begegnungen beginnt der lange Weg jenes Mannes, der später als Sekretär von Alexander dem Großen Geschichte schreiben wird.

»Eumenes« von Nobunaga Shimazaki

📜 Beschreibung 》
Im 4. Jahrhundert vor Christus reist der gebildete junge Eumenes gemeinsam mit dem großen Philosophen Aristoteles nach Kardia, seiner Heimat und dem Ort, an dem alles begann. Schon als Kind fiel Eumenes durch außergewöhnliche Begabung, scharfe Beobachtungsgabe und ein erstaunliches Urteilsvermögen auf. Doch ein Vorfall in Kardia reißt ihn aus seinem vertrauten Leben und zwingt ihn, sich seinem eigenen Schicksal zu stellen. Zwischen Seefahrten, rastlosen Tagen und neuen Begegnungen beginnt der lange Weg jenes Mannes, der später als Sekretär von Alexander dem Großen Geschichte schreiben wird.

「HTTP」「HTTPS」以外のポートへ接続を許可している環境や、ビルドエージェントがサーバと同一ホストで稼働している環境などが影響を受ける。

「令和8年度 住民税（第1期）納付のご案内」などとしてメールを送りつけ、記載したURLより電子決済アプリへ誘導し、送金させる手口だという。
